Achievement: First privately funded, fully liquid-fueled rocket to reach orbit.[152]
First privately funded, fully liquid-fueled rocket to put a commercial satellite in orbit.
First private company to successfully launch, orbit, and recover a spacecraft.
First private company to send a spacecraft to the International Space Station (ISS).[153]
First landing of an orbital-class rocket's first stage on land.
First landing of an orbital-class rocket's first stage on an ocean platform.
First reuse and (second) landing of an orbital first stage.[67]
First controlled flyback and recovery of a payload fairing.[154]
First reuse of a commercial cargo spacecraft.[155]
First private spacecraft launched into heliocentric orbit.
First private company to send a human-rated spacecraft to orbit.
First private company to autonomously dock a human-rated spacecraft to the ISS.
First flight of a full-flow staged combustion cycle engine (Raptor).[156]
First reuse of a payload fairing.[157]
First private company to send humans into orbit.[158]
First private company to send humans to the ISS.[159]
Most spacecraft launched on a single mission, 143 satellites.[a][160]
First reuse of a crewed space capsule.[161]
First reused booster to send humans into orbit.
First reused booster to launch a 'national security' mission.[162]
First orbital launch of an all-private crew.[163][164]
Longest streak of orbital launches without a mission failure or partial failure for a single rocket type (Falcon 9, 101 launches).[165]
First all-private crew to dock with the International Space Station.[166]
Highest number of launches of a single rocket type in a calendar year (Falcon 9, 48 launches).[167]
Tallest, most massive, most powerful rocket to ever launch.[168][169]
Starship reaches intended orbital velocity for the first time.[170]
A single Falcon 9 booster reused for the 20th time.[171]
First commercial spacewalk
First Super Heavy booster catch
First in space relight of a full-flow staged combustion cycle engine (Raptor).[130]
First reuse of a Super Heavy booster
